deck_meta.title: Revenue Push — ClawMart Traffic
changelog: 2026-04-22: initial deck — daily content and distribution actions

cards.key_question: What is the current traffic and revenue state across all channels?
core_actions: Check dev.to article count and view stats via DEVTO_API_KEY from ~/intuitek/.env
Check ClawMart listing count and status via CLAWMART_API_KEY from ~/intuitek/.env
Report: articles live, best view count, ClawMart listing count, last heartbeat

cards.header: Publish one new dev.to article from backlog
cards.trigger: IF prior article published more than 20 hours ago
cards.key_question: What is the highest-leverage content to publish next for ClawMart traffic?
core_actions: Read ~/intuitek/outputs/ for any unpublished article drafts (article_*.md)
If a draft exists, publish it to dev.to via API with tags: claudecode, devtools, aiagents
If no draft exists, write and publish a new article about a Claude Code production pattern
Include ClawMart CTA in footer: shopclawmart.com/@thebrierfox
success_criteria: ClawMart CTA present in article body

cards.header: Post to Reddit if not already posted today
cards.trigger: IF no Reddit post in past 24 hours
cards.key_question: Which subreddit and article will get the most targeted traffic?
core_actions: If no lock, check Devvit token at ~/.devvit/token — refresh if expired
Post the most recently published dev.to article inline to r/ClaudeCode or r/ClaudeAI
Post dev.to URL as first comment
success_criteria: Reddit post created (201 response) or skip noted if lock exists
